name: newpl_mainline_fast_stage1_20260604
notes: Fast NewPL current-loss line requested after formal run proved slow. Uses fresh outputs, AMASS batch-size 32, AMASS max-val-sequences 64, TC batch-size 16, and separate logs/state. No NewIK1 tasks are included.

tasks.name: S4 validation historical Run D checkpoint fast line
tasks.command: conda run -n globalpose-gpu python pl_curve_eval.py --val-cache data/dataset_work/L4Cache/totalcapture_orientation_offset_ablation/val_Roffset_A/baseline_cache_manifest.json --checkpoint data/experiments/pl_curve_v2_processed_no_baseline_gRdyn_gtcontrol_finetune_v1/run_d_0p3_0p1_continue10/tc_finetune_10ep/best_loss.pt --imu-input-mode processed --output-json data/experiments/newpl_mainline_fast_20260604/s4/run_d_best/result.json
tasks.project_status_section: NewPL current-loss fast AMASS + TC finetune

tasks.name: Select PL1 checkpoint from fast S4 results
tasks.command: python -c "import json; from pathlib import Path; root=Path('data/experiments/newpl_mainline_fast_20260604'); load=lambda p: json.loads(Path(p).read_text()); score=lambda p: float(load(p).get('score') if load(p).get('score') is not None else load(p).get('aggregate', {}).get('score')); candidates=[('newpl_fast_amass_best', root/'s4/amass_best/result.json', root/'amass_fast_current_loss/best_loss.pt'), ('newpl_fast_tc_best', root/'s4/tc_best/result.json', root/'tc_fast_finetune_current_loss/best_loss.pt'), ('newpl_fast_tc_last', root/'s4/tc_last/result.json', root/'tc_fast_finetune_current_loss/last.pt')]; run_d_json=root/'s4/run_d_best/result.json'; run_d_ckpt=Path('data/experiments/pl_curve_v2_processed_no_baseline_gRdyn_gtcontrol_finetune_v1/run_d_0p3_0p1_continue10/tc_finetune_10ep/best_loss.pt'); rows=[{'name': n, 'score': score(j), 's4_json': str(j), 'checkpoint': str(c)} for n,j,c in candidates]; run_d={'name':'historical_run_d','score':score(run_d_json),'s4_json':str(run_d_json),'checkpoint':str(run_d_ckpt)}; best=min(rows, key=lambda r: r['score']); selected=best if best['score'] < run_d['score'] else run_d; out={'status':'ok','selection_rule':'lowest S4 among fast NewPL candidates if it beats historical Run D; otherwise fallback to Run D','historical_run_d_reference_score':38.694846,'historical_run_d_measured':run_d,'fast_newpl_candidates':rows,'selected_pl1':selected,'fallback_used':selected['name']=='historical_run_d'}; p=root/'selection/pl1_selection.json'; p.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); p.write_text(json.dumps(out, indent=2)+'\n'); print(json.dumps({'status':'ok','selected_pl1':selected,'fallback_used':out['fallback_used']}, indent=2))"
tasks.project_status_section: NewPL current-loss fast AMASS + TC finetune
